description: ClaimsRawExplorer (ClaimsRawExplorer) for the ClaimsOps, ClaimsAnalyst persona(s). Bound to PayerAnalytics semantic model (Direct Lake over lh_gold_curated) and the Payer_Ontology graph. Allowed gold tables: fact_claim, fact_appeal, fact_auth, dim_member, dim_provider, dim_payer, dim_procedure, dim_diagnosis, dim_date.
